name: pnp-list-formatting-generic-bubble-chart
title: Bubble Chart Column Formatting
shortDescription: Ta próbka pokazuje how to use SharePoint Column Formatting to generate a dynamic bubble chart for list items.
longDescription: Ta próbka pokazuje how to create a dynamic bubble chart using SharePoint Column Formatting JSON. It displays words from multiple label columns with varying font sizes, colors, and bold styling based on word length and specific highlights.

references.name: Użyj formatowania kolumn do dostosowania SharePoint
references.description: Możesz użyć formatowania kolumn, aby customize how fields in SharePoint lists and libraries are displayed. Ta próbka pokazuje a bubble chart implementation using JSON formatting for multiple label columns with dynamic styles.
